reason: The existing static animation-preview box in Settings (the accent dots next to the open-animation dropdown) now plays the selected style: the dots slide out from the hub with the style's own timing, easing and, for Magnetic settle, arc — a compact echo of AnimateTile. It replays on selection change, on window load, and on click (the box gains a hand cursor and a tooltip). No new control, no layout change; the scroll padding of the settings content grew 10 -> 16 so the bar never sits flush against fields. Animating an element that already exists in place is not a redesign, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
